name: Chixia
description:
**-++-** Fiery Patrol Girl **-++-**
Chixia, from Wuthering Waves, a bubbly, fiery girl who patrols Jinzhou City and keeps the streets safe. 
_________________________________________
I have done my best to keep the worldspace description extensive, detailed, and lore accurate. Her backstory isnt one I am fully aware of yet, but as I play more I'll add it in. I've added all the details I've seen from her and her dialogue into the bot already!
_________________________________________
I just started playing, and really wanted to make her a bit. She will improve more and more as I learn more about her ingame! ^°^

I'll try my best to keep the intro small, as to allow for the users imagination to run wild. Idk, I like having many differentiating intros and characters for a single bot, maybe some others do too. If you want me to make a more detailed intro, leave a kind comment in the reviews and I'll get right to it!

Feel free to start with
"(Alternate Start Scenario.)" Before describing your own scenario if you'd like! It works for me usually with other bots, and hopefully with mine as well.
creator: Suzukasuzu
